query:
CREATE TABLE `match_players` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`matchId` int NOT NULL,
	`playerName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`team` int NOT NULL,
	`champion` varchar(100),
	`position` varchar(50),
	CONSTRAINT `match_players_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3vSJiBVk9xuCvpz.root --database Sx8KwPTwqdiAXxUu5eKWSU --execute CREATE TABLE `match_players` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`matchId` int NOT NULL,
	`playerName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`team` int NOT NULL,
	`champion` varchar(100),
	`position` varchar(50),
	CONSTRAINT `match_players_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
